/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/instantdb_init.dir/src/cmd/instantdb_init.cpp.o -o instantdb_init  libcommon_lib.a _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a _deps/fmt-build/libfmtd.a
